prompt: A hyper-realistic futuristic racing game splash screen set in a neon-soaked cyberpunk city at night, showing a Formula-style electric race on a rain-slick street circuit from a low third-person chase camera behind the player's car. The main car is a sleek black open-wheel racer with glowing cyan accent lines, cyan-lit wheel rims, and bright red rear light text reading NEO.JP, drifting slightly on wet asphalt and throwing sparks from the underbody. Ahead are 3 opponent cars total, including a red open-wheel car on the right, a darker car in the center distance, and another car farther ahead near the curve. The road curves left through a canyon of tall buildings covered in giant LED billboards and vertical neon signs, with strong reflections in the wet pavement. At the center background, a massive illuminated billboard reads FORMULA NEO with NEO in huge cyan letters. Add yellow illuminated chevron barriers along both sides of the turn and intense motion blur emphasizing speed. Overlay a complete esports racing HUD: top left position indicator showing 2/8 with a small POS label; a left leaderboard with 8 ranked drivers total, listing 1 KAZUKI, 2 NEO DRIVER, 3 REIJI, 4 YUINA, 5 SHO, 6 ALICE, 7 LUCAS, 8 TAIGA, with time gaps next to most names; top right lap info showing LAP 2/3, BEST 00:58.123, LAP 00:21.456, sector times S1 00:21.456, S2 00:36.890, S3 --:--:---; an objective box reading OBJECTIVE and 1位でフィニッシュする; bottom left a track minimap and a DRS meter at 98%; bottom right a circular futuristic speedometer showing 278 KM/H and gear 6. Along the bottom foreground, place a lineup of 8 anime-style team member portraits from the chest up, evenly spanning the width like a character roster overlay: 1 a silver-haired person in a white racing jacket, 2 a red-haired person in a red jacket over a black shirt with a flame emblem, 3 a long purple-haired person in a purple outfit, 4 a black-haired person in a dark Team Neo racing suit, 5 a short blue-black-haired person in a dark suit, 6 a light-brown-haired person in a gray suit, 7 a green-haired person in a white and green outfit with a hand on the chest, 8 a blond person in a yellow jacket, plus at the far right an additional pink-haired hoodie portrait integrated into the bottom lineup for a dense team-banner look; center the text TEAM NEO above the bottom portraits in glowing cyan UI styling. Use a polished AAA game key art aesthetic, ultra-detailed reflections, cinematic contrast, electric blue and magenta lighting, sharp UI graphics, dramatic perspective, and a highly realistic yet stylized promotional poster finish.
